core.label: Nim Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, types, and Nim's Python-like ergonomics with C-like performance.

topics.label: Installation & Nimble
topics.description: Install Nim and use Nimble package manager. Nim compiles to C, C++, or JavaScript.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: var (mutable), let (immutable), const (compile-time). Indentation-based syntax like Python.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elif/else, case, for, while. Indentation-sensitive with no braces.

topics.label: Procedures & Functions
topics.description: proc for side effects, func for pure functions. Uniform function call syntax (UFCS).

topics.label: Strings & Sequences
topics.description: Mutable strings, seq[T] dynamic arrays, and array[N, T] fixed arrays.

topics.label: Objects & Inheritance
topics.description: object types with inheritance via of keyword. Nim supports OOP and value types.

topics.label: Enums & Variants
topics.description: Enumeration types and object variants for tagged unions.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: try/except/finally with Exception hierarchy, and Option/Result patterns.

topics.label: Generics & Templates
topics.description: Generic procedures and compile-time templates for metaprogramming.

topics.label: Macros
topics.description: AST-level metaprogramming with macro keyword. Nim macros are extremely powerful.
